pages.text: <?xml version="1.0"?> <gc:Codelist xmlns:gc="http://docs.oasis-open.org/codelist/ns/genericode/1.0/"> <gc:Identification> <gc:ShortName Lang="en">Type of goods or services subject to RCM</gc:ShortName> <gc:Version>1</gc:Version> </gc:Identification> <gc:ColumnSet> <gc:Column Id="id" Use="required"> <gc:ShortName>Identifier</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="name" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Name</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="description" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Description</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Key Id="idKey"> <gc:ColumnRef Ref="id"/> </gc:Key> </gc:ColumnSet> <gc:SimpleCodeList> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.48.8.2</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Electronic Devices</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.48.8.1</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Gold and Diamonds</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.48.3.1</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Crude or refined oil</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.48.3.2</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Unprocessed or processed natural gas</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.48.3.3</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Pure hydrocarbons</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> </gc:SimpleCodeList> </gc:Codelist>
